prestazioni: Engine swap to Ford Duratec 3.0L V6 (AJ30) with forged internals (Manley connecting rods, JE pistons, ARP head studs) and a custom turbo kit utilizing a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a Borla Pro XS muffler and a Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter for optimized backpressure and flow.

Suspension overhaul with KW Variant 3 coilovers (8-position adjustable damping, 30mm drop) and Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) to reduce body roll, complemented by Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings for improved chassis rigidity and response.

Fuel system upgrade with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom ECU tune via a SCT X4 Performance Programmer with a custom Ford PCM calibration to support 350+ WHP on E85 fuel, paired with a Mishimoto aluminum radiator and dual 10-inch SPAL fans for consistent cooling.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works kit (front and rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) modified to fit the Tribute ES chassis, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon with a functional heat extractor vent.

OEM+ aggressive front end styling with a custom 3M matte black wrap on the stock grille, replaced with a custom mesh grille from Grillcraft, and a set of Hella 500 FF auxiliary lights mounted in a custom aluminum bumper insert for a rally-inspired look.

Interior overhaul with Recaro SRD-X seats (retaining OEM mounting points for safety), a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub with a Momo Mod.78 wheel, and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (6-point, TIG-welded, chromoly steel) painted in Mazda Racing Orange (MZ-001) for weight reduction and structural rigidity.
